category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Singapore) compliance gap comparison.

target_market_label.zh: 新加坡（EMA / 企业发展局）
target_market_label.zht: 新加坡（EMA / 企業發展局）

title.en: China-to-Singapore Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入新加坡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入新加坡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Singapore requirements: the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme and SAFETY Mark for Controlled Goods administered by Enterprise Singapore, the Registered Supplier obligation, SS/IEC 62133 cell safety, IMDA radio registration for wireless features, UN 38.3 transport, and NEA e-waste producer responsibility.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与新加坡要求对照：企业发展局管理的《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》及受管制货品SAFETY标志、注册供应商义务、SS/IEC 62133电芯安全、含无线功能产品的IMDA无线电注册、UN 38.3运输，以及NEA电子废物生产者责任。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與新加坡要求對照：企業發展局管理的《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》及受管制貨品SAFETY標誌、註冊供應商義務、SS/IEC 62133電芯安全、含無線功能產品的IMDA無線電註冊、UN 38.3運輸，以及NEA電子廢物生產者責任。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters selling to Singapore must register controlled goods under the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme to obtain the SAFETY Mark via Enterprise Singapore, with a Singapore-based Registered Supplier holding the registration, supported by SS/IEC 62133 test evidence and a valid UN 38.3 transport report; wireless-enabled power banks also need IMDA registration. None of these are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 向新加坡销售的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，须依据《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》将受管制货品注册，以经企业发展局取得SAFETY标志，并由设于新加坡的注册供应商持有该注册，同时提供SS/IEC 62133检测证据及有效的UN 38.3运输报告；含无线功能的移动电源还须完成IMDA注册。上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 向新加坡銷售的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，須依據《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》將受管制貨品註冊，以經企業發展局取得SAFETY標誌，並由設於新加坡的註冊供應商持有該註冊，同時提供SS/IEC 62133檢測證據及有效的UN 38.3運輸報告；含無線功能的行動電源還須完成IMDA註冊。上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator or standards-body URLs from enterprisesg.gov.sg, imda.gov.sg, nea.gov.sg, singaporestandardseshop.sg, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
